summary: Iteration 44: Testing NEW Weekly Challenges and Referral System features. Fixed critical bug: UserPlus icon not imported causing /register?ref=CODE page to crash. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified working: Weekly Challenges with 3 active challenges, progress tracking, timer, Referral section with copy button and stats.

ui_bugs.issue: UserPlus icon was not imported, causing crash on /register?ref=CODE
ui_bugs.resolution: Added UserPlus to lucide-react imports in App.js line 6-13

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/challenges/active - Challenge objects have all required fields
✅ GET /api/challenges/my-progress - Returns 3 progress items with current/target/completed/claimed
✅ GET /api/referrals/my-link - Returns referral_code (first 8 chars of user ID), referral_link, points_per_referral (30)
✅ POST /api/referrals/apply - Valid referral awards 30 points to referrer
✅ POST /api/auth/register with referral_code - Triggers referral point award
✅ Weekly timer/countdown visible with week end time
✅ 3 challenge progress cards displayed with progress bars
✅ My Rank Card visible for authenticated users (data-testid='my-rank-card')
✅ Referral stats displayed: Поканени (invited), Точки от покани (points earned), +30 На покана (per referral)
✅ Leaderboard entries displayed with rank, name, city, points
critical_code_review_comments: Bug FIXED: UserPlus icon was missing from lucide-react imports in App.js, causing RegisterPage to crash when accessed with ?ref=CODE parameter
Weekly Challenges: 3 challenges rotate based on ISO week number, bonuses: +100, +50, +75 for different actions
Referral System: Code is first 8 chars of user ID, 30 points per successful referral
Referral apply endpoint (/api/referrals/apply) is called internally during registration via httpx to localhost:8001
Challenge claim validates: 1) challenge is active this week, 2) not already claimed, 3) target met

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Weekly Challenges and Referral features verified)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest: TEST_iter44_* (with unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested Weekly Challenges and Referral System. Key test IDs: weekly-challenges, challenge-{id}, claim-{id}, referral-section, copy-referral-link, referral-banner, my-rank-card. Challenges rotate based on ISO week number (3 per week). Referral code = first 8 chars of user ID. Points: referral=30, register=10, create_project=20, leave_review=15, portfolio_add=10, daily_login=2. The UserPlus import was missing and has been fixed in App.js.
